tasks.subject: Task 1: Federation client — auth_time + step-up authorize params
tasks.description:
Add Tokens.AuthTime (from claims.AuthTime) and extend AuthURL with variadic options + StepUpAuthOptions (prompt=login, max_age=0).

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/federation/oidc/client.go","pkg/federation/oidc/federation_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./pkg/federation/oidc/ -run 'AuthURL|AuthTime' -v","acceptanceCriteria":["Tokens.AuthTime populated","AuthURL accepts extra options","StepUpAuthOptions sets prompt=login+max_age=0"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: FedState sudo flow + Federator.SudoBegin
tasks.description:
FedState.SudoAccountID/ExpectedSub + SudoKey; SudoBegin validates linked+enabled identity and stashes state + forced-re-auth URL.

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/federation/oidc/state.go","pkg/federation/oidc/federation.go","db/queries/account_identity.sql"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./pkg/federation/oidc/ -run 'SudoBegin|HappyPath|LinkBegin|StashesState' -v","acceptanceCriteria":["FedState sudo fields + SudoKey","SudoBegin binds state + forces re-auth","login/link tests stay green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Federator.SudoCallback + sudo error codes
tasks.description:
SudoCallback: single-use state + browser binding + id_token verify + identity-match (sub==ExpectedSub, account match) + auth_time freshness (<=120s). New ErrSudoIdentityMismatch / ErrSudoReauthStale.

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/federation/oidc/federation.go","pkg/authn/errors.go","pkg/federation/oidc/federation_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./pkg/federation/oidc/ ./pkg/authn/ -run 'SudoCallback|Sudo' -v","acceptanceCriteria":["identity-match check","auth_time freshness 120s","new error codes wired"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Surface federation_oidc in sudo methods + provider list
tasks.description:
availableSudoMethods keeps federation_oidc; /me/sudo/methods returns federationProviders (linked + non-disabled).

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/server/handle_sudo.go","pkg/server/handle_sudo_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./pkg/server/ -run Sudo -v","acceptanceCriteria":["federation_oidc surfaced","federationProviders linked+enabled only","empty when none"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: /me/sudo/begin federation branch + callback route
tasks.description:
begin{federation_oidc} returns {redirect}+fed-state cookie; GET /me/sudo/federation/callback (sessionReq) calls SudoCallback, stamps via extracted applySudoGrant, 302 to validated returnTo.

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/server/handle_sudo.go","pkg/server/server.go","pkg/server/handle_sudo_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./pkg/server/ -run Sudo -v && go build ./...","acceptanceCriteria":["begin redirect branch","callback stamps + 302","failure never stamps","returnTo guarded"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Frontend — OIDC re-auth option in the sudo modal
tasks.description:
SudoModal renders a button per federationProvider; click posts begin{federation_oidc,slug,returnTo} then hardRedirect. New i18n + error strings; grep-verify en.ts apostrophes.

```json:metadata
{"files":["dashboard/src/components/custom/SudoModal.vue","dashboard/src/locales/en.ts","dashboard/src/lib/sudo.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd dashboard && npm test && npm run build","acceptanceCriteria":["provider buttons render","click begins+hardRedirects","i18n added + apostrophes verified"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Mock OP step-up + smoke arc + full gate
tasks.description:
Mock OP emits fresh auth_time + accepts prompt/max_age; smoke: federated user OIDC-sudo then sudo-gated add-passkey succeeds. Full gate green + dist rebuilt/committed.

```json:metadata
{"files":["cmd/smoke/mockop/server.go","cmd/smoke/main.go","pkg/webui/dist"],"verifyCommand":"go build ./... && go vet ./... && go test ./...","acceptanceCriteria":["mock OP emits auth_time","smoke federated-sudo arc passes","full gate green + dist committed"]}
```
